name: jdy_list_dept_users
description_zh: 获取指定部门下的所有成员，支持递归获取子部门成员
description: List members in a department. Set has_child=true to recursively include all sub-department members. Returns users[] each with username, name, departments, type, status, integrate_id. Rate limit: 10/s.

dept_no.description: 部门编号（根部门编号为1）

has_child.description: 是否递归获取子部门成员，默认false
